title: Explore New Lightroom Features - Adobe
metaDescription: Explore Lightroom's new amazing image-editing features. Get to know the tools and features you can use to make your photos amazing anywhere you are.

og.title: Explore New Lightroom Features - Adobe
og.description: Explore Lightroom's new amazing image-editing features. Get to know the tools and features you can use to make your photos amazing anywhere you are.

headings.text: Explore all the latest features in Lightroom.
Tap into a new mobile experience.
Personalize your photos with one-step edits.
Perfect light and color, add effects, and get every detail just right.
Select and edit a single color.
Enlarge low-res images, clean up distractions, and get photos print-ready.
Sort, access, and export your files from anywhere, get editing tips, and more.
Creative Cloud Pro for students and teachers
How-to: Edit photos, boost resolution, and more.
The only photo editor you need.
Edit photos faster with Lightroom presets.
Flexible photo sharing at your fingertips.
Boost your image quality to the max with Super Resolution.
Questo sito Adobe non corrisponde alla tua posizione geografica

landmarks.innerText:
Home
/
Adobe Creative Cloud
/
Adobe Lightroom
/
Features

Lightroom

Explore Lightroom features.

Get to know the tools and features you can use to make your photos amazing anywhere you are.

Update Lightroom

What's new
Instant edits
Fine-tune
Enhance quality
Organize and share
Explore all the latest features in Lightroom.
Quickly improve image quality.

Save time using generative upscale with Topaz Gigapixel, now including powerful 4x upscaling. Easily crop into images without losing detail, and recover clarity in low-resolution photos.

Select your best photos faster.

New AI-powered Assisted Culling supercharges the selection process by intelligently filtering your photos around image quality, grouping similar shots, and more.

Polish portraits with ease.

Go from a quick touch-up to a full glow-up with Quick Actions. Easily retouch skin, remove blemishes, whiten teeth, and more.

Remove more distractions in seconds.

New Dust Removal quickly recognizes and removes sensor dust from your photos with incredible precision.

Create a custom blur.

Instantly create a stunning portrait effect in any photo with Lens Blur, powered by AI. Use new one-tap presets to easily focus on your subject and blur out everything else.

Tap into a new mobile experience.

Use a more streamlined toolbar that includes Presets, Crop, Edit, and other frequently used tools, organize photos from the top bar, and more.

View all features

Membership plans

Get Lightroom.

Start with just Lightroom, or get Lightroom and 20+ other apps with the Creative Cloud Pro plan.

Individuals
Students and teachers
Teams

Lightroom for mobile, desktop, and web, plus Lightroom Classic and Photoshop.

Photography

Edit photos from anywhere you are with easy ways to adjust exposure, color, and more.
Make your best photos even better with editing tools designed for your desktop.
Create gorgeous images, rich graphics, and incredible art
Tutorials, fonts, templates, and more
1TB of cloud storage
1,000 monthly generative credits

Save 50% on Lightroom and 20+ apps, plus creative AI. Pay US$34.99/mo for the first 3 months, then US$69.99/mo after that. New subscribers only. See terms.
